key_improvements.title: State Abstraction Soundness with Conservative Overapproximation
critique_addressed: State abstraction soundness gap: no formal proof that discretization is conservative overapproximation
Verification gap between Lean proofs and Python implementation
key_improvements.description: Add formal conservative overapproximation proof for StateDiscretization. Implement interval arithmetic for floating-point soundness. Build independent certificate verifier (~500 LoC) that re-derives PAC-Bayes bounds from raw data without depending on main codebase. Add discretization refinement with provable convergence.
deliverables: Formal proof in appendix showing abstract transition overapproximates concrete

key_improvements.title: Per-Stage Error Decomposition and Rich LTL Specifications
critique_addressed: Cascading error propagation not captured by composition bound
key_improvements.description: Replace monolithic epsilon_1 + epsilon_2 composition with per-stage decomposition tracking epsilon_regime + epsilon_DAG + epsilon_invariance + epsilon_shield. Instantiate bounded liveness specifications (drawdown recovery, loss recovery, position reduction) using existing BoundedLTL infrastructure. Add experiments showing which pipeline stage dominates error budget.
deliverables: Experiments showing error budget breakdown across pipeline stages

key_improvements.title: Comprehensive Prior Sensitivity Analysis
critique_addressed: Prior sensitivity analysis absent for critical hyperparameters
Gaussian emission model mismatch with heavy-tailed financial data
key_improvements.description: Add systematic prior sensitivity sweeps for sticky kappa, emission priors, PAC-Bayes prior counts. Implement Student-t emission model for heavy-tailed data. Report regime count, DAG structure, PAC-Bayes bound, and shield permissivity as functions of hyperparameters. Run experiments and generate publication-quality figures.

additional_work.paper_rewrite: Complete rewrite of tool_paper.tex with new results, 10 pages main + 20 appendix
additional_work.grounding_update: Update grounding.json with all new claims and evidence
additional_work.api_update: Document new modules, remove aspirational features
